title: German Spiced Cheese Casserole
description: A hearty and flavorful German-inspired casserole packed with spiced cheese, perfect for a cold winter night.
instructions: Cook Ukrainian sausage in a skillet over medium-high heat until browned, breaking into small pieces as it cooks.
In a separate saucepan, melt butter over medium heat.
Add flour and whisk to combine, cooking for 1-2 minutes.
Slowly add milk, whisking constantly to avoid lumps.
Bring mixture to a simmer and cook until thickened, stirring occasionally.
Add shredded cheese and stir until melted and smooth.
In a large mixing bowl, combine cooked sausage, cheese sauce, caramelized onions, spiced breadcrumbs, egg, salt, and pepper.
Transfer mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish and top with additional shredded cheese.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until golden brown and set.
Remove from oven and let cool for 10-15 minutes before serving.
